#include <iostream>
#include <fstream>
#include <opencv2/opencv.hpp>
using namespace std;
using namespace cv;

// BLUE, GREEN, RED --> 0, 1, 2 --> blue = img[100,100,0]

float distance(int b, int g, int r, Vec3b split) {
      return sqrt(pow((float)b - (float)split[0], 2) + pow((float)g - (float)split[1], 2) + pow((float)r - (float)split[2], 2));
}

void drawSquare(Mat format, int r, int c, Vec3b color){
    for(int row = r; row < r+100; row++){
        for(int col = c; col < c+100; col++){
            format.at<Vec3b>(row, col)[0] = color[0];
            format.at<Vec3b>(row, col)[1] = color[1];
            format.at<Vec3b>(row, col)[2] = color[2];
            
            if(row == r || row == r + 100 || col == c || col == c + 100){
                format.at<Vec3b>(row, col)[0] = 0;
                format.at<Vec3b>(row, col)[1] = 0;
                format.at<Vec3b>(row, col)[2] = 0;
            }
        }
    }
}

int main(int argc, char* argv[])
{
    string pictures[] = {"aloha", "bluefin_trevally", "chameleon", "cheetah", "chess", "crab_spider", "peppers", "peru", "seahorse"};

    for(int picture = 0; picture < 9; picture++)
    {
        Mat img = imread("pictures/" + pictures[picture] + ".png");
        
        cout << pictures[picture] << endl;
        
        
        vector<Vec3b> splits; //k = whatever
        splits.push_back(Vec3b(64, 64, 64));
        splits.push_back(Vec3b(128, 128, 128));
        splits.push_back(Vec3b(192, 192, 192));
        
        vector<Vec3b> prev; //k = whatever
        prev.push_back(Vec3b(64, 64, 64));
        prev.push_back(Vec3b(128, 128, 128));
        prev.push_back(Vec3b(192, 192, 192));

        vector<Vec3b> comp; //k = whatever
        comp.push_back(Vec3b(64, 64, 64));
        comp.push_back(Vec3b(128, 128, 128));
        comp.push_back(Vec3b(192, 192, 192));
        
        
        int COUNTME = 0;
        int round = 0;
        
        int group[img.rows][img.cols];
        int moves[6] = {0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0};
                
        /*
        0 ==> 0 to 1
        1 ==> 1 to 2
        2 ==> 0 to 2
        3 ==> 1 to 0
        4 ==> 2 to 1
        5 ==> 2 to 0
        */

        for(int r = 0; r < img.rows; r++){
            for(int c = 0; c < img.cols; c++){
                group[r][c] = -1;
            }
        }
        vector<vector<array<long long,3>>> moveSumsByRound;
        vector<vector<int>> moveCountsByRound;
         
        while(true){
            
            round += 1;
            
            float sum[splits.size()][3] = {0.0};
            // x is the SPLIT and y is the COLOR

            float count[splits.size()] = {0.0};
            // how many points fall under each section?

            vector<array<long long,3>> moveSums(6);
            for(int m = 0; m < 6; m++){
                moveSums[m] = {0LL, 0LL, 0LL};
            }
            vector<int> moveCounts(6, 0);
                        
            for(int r = 0; r < img.rows; r++){
                for(int c = 0; c < img.cols; c++){
                    
                    int blue = img.at<Vec3b>(r,c)[0];
                    int green = img.at<Vec3b>(r,c)[1];
                    int red = img.at<Vec3b>(r,c)[2];
                                        
                    int whichSplit = 0;
                    float bestDist = distance(blue, green, red, splits[0]);

                    for(int split = 1; split < splits.size(); split++){
                        float d = distance(blue, green, red, splits[split]);
                        
                        if(d < bestDist){
                            bestDist = d;
                            whichSplit = split;
                        }
                    }

                    sum[whichSplit][0] += blue;
                    sum[whichSplit][1] += green;
                    sum[whichSplit][2] += red;
                    count[whichSplit]++;
                    
                    int prevSplit = group[r][c];
                    if(prevSplit != whichSplit && prevSplit != -1){
                        if(prevSplit == 0){
                            if(whichSplit == 1){
                                moves[0] += 1;
                                moveCounts[0] += 1;
                                moveSums[0][0] += blue;
                                moveSums[0][1] += green;
                                moveSums[0][2] += red;
                            }
                            if(whichSplit == 2){
                                moves[2] += 1;
                                moveCounts[2] += 1;
                                moveSums[2][0] += blue;
                                moveSums[2][1] += green;
                                moveSums[2][2] += red;
                            }
                        }
                        if(prevSplit == 1){
                            if(whichSplit == 0){
                                moves[3] += 1;
                                moveCounts[3] += 1;
                                moveSums[3][0] += blue;
                                moveSums[3][1] += green;
                                moveSums[3][2] += red;
                            }
                            if(whichSplit == 2){
                                moves[1] += 1;
                                moveCounts[1] += 1;
                                moveSums[1][0] += blue;
                                moveSums[1][1] += green;
                                moveSums[1][2] += red;
                            }
                        }
                        if(prevSplit == 2){
                            if(whichSplit == 0){
                                moves[5] += 1;
                                moveCounts[5] += 1;
                                moveSums[5][0] += blue;
                                moveSums[5][1] += green;
                                moveSums[5][2] += red;
                            }
                            if(whichSplit == 1){
                                moves[4] += 1;
                                moveCounts[4] += 1;
                                moveSums[4][0] += blue;
                                moveSums[4][1] += green;
                                moveSums[4][2] += red;
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    
                    group[r][c] = whichSplit;
                    

                }
            }

            moveSumsByRound.push_back(moveSums);
            moveCountsByRound.push_back(moveCounts);
            
            for(int s = 0; s < splits.size(); s++){
                Vec3f mean1 = sum[s][0]/(1.0*count[s]);
                Vec3f mean2 = sum[s][1]/(1.0*count[s]);
                Vec3f mean3 = sum[s][2]/(1.0*count[s]);
                splits[s] = Vec3b((int)mean1[0], (int)mean2[0], (int)mean3[0]);
            }
            
            
            for(int split = 0; split < splits.size(); split++){
                prev.push_back(splits[split]);
            }
            
            int breakNow = 1;
            
            for(int split = 1; split < splits.size(); split++){
                if(comp[split] == splits[split]){
                    breakNow *= 1;
                }else{
                    breakNow *= 0;
                }
            }
            
            if(breakNow == 1){
                break;
            }else{
               comp = splits;
               COUNTME += 1;
            }

        }
                
        int maxVal = 0;
        int max = 0;
            
        for(int g = 0; g < 6; g++){
            if(moves[g] > maxVal){
                maxVal = moves[g];
                max = g;
            }
        }
        
        /*
        0 ==> 0 to 1
        1 ==> 1 to 2
        2 ==> 0 to 2
        3 ==> 1 to 0
        4 ==> 2 to 1
        5 ==> 2 to 0
        */
        
        int from = 0;
        int to = 0;
        
        if(max == 0){
            from = 0;
            to = 1;
        }else if(max == 1){
            from = 1;
            to = 2;
        }else if(max == 2){
            from = 0;
            to = 2;
        }else if(max == 3){
            from = 1;
            to = 0;
        }else if(max == 4){
            from = 2;
            to = 1;
        }else if(max == 5){
            from = 2;
            to = 0;
        }
        
        Mat format = imread("pictures/template.png");
        
        int roundsRecorded = (int)moveSumsByRound.size();
        for(int trial = 0; trial < 8; trial++){
            Vec3b fromColor = prev[(3*trial)+from];
            Vec3b midColor = Vec3b(128,128,128);
            Vec3b toColor = prev[(3*trial)+to];
            
            int cnt = moveCountsByRound[trial][max];
            if(cnt > 0){
                long long sumB = moveSumsByRound[trial][max][0];
                long long sumG = moveSumsByRound[trial][max][1];
                long long sumR = moveSumsByRound[trial][max][2];
                int avgB = (int)(sumB / cnt);
                int avgG = (int)(sumG / cnt);
                int avgR = (int)(sumR / cnt);
                midColor = Vec3b(avgB, avgG, avgR);
            }else{
                int base = (3 * trial);
                if(base + from >= 0 && base + from < (int)prev.size() && base + to >= 0 && base + to < (int)prev.size()){
                    Vec3b fromCol = prev[base + from];
                    Vec3b toCol = prev[base + to];
                    midColor = Vec3b((fromCol[0] + toCol[0]) / 2, (fromCol[1] + toCol[1]) / 2, (fromCol[2] + toCol[2]) / 2);
                }else{
                    midColor = Vec3b(128,128,128);
                }
            }
            
            drawSquare(format, 0, trial*100, fromColor);
            drawSquare(format, 100, trial*100, midColor);
            drawSquare(format, 200, trial*100, toColor);
        }
        cout << "Total Steps: " << COUNTME << endl;
        cout << prev[prev.size()-3 + from] << "<== Moved from" << endl;
        cout << prev[prev.size()-3 + to] << "<== Moved to" << endl;
        imwrite("challenge2/" + string(pictures[picture]) + ".png", format);
    }

    return 0;
}
